components.name: Gradient Button
components.description: Primary action button with Electric Violet to Sui Blue gradient.
components.css: .ds-btn-gradient { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6c63ff 0%, #3b82f6 100%); color: #fff; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-btn-gradient:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(108, 99, 255, 0.4); }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Translucent elevated surface card with blur and subtle highlight.
components.html:
Subscription Active

Monthly automated billing active on Sui network.
components.css: .ds-glass-card { background: rgba(18, 18, 26, 0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; color: #fff; }

narrative.overview: PayStreamer combines high-performance Web3 architecture with sleek, high-contrast dark visual aesthetics.
keyCharacteristics: High-contrast dark backgrounds with neon violet and blue gradients
Translucent glassmorphism for cards and elevated panels
JetBrains Mono typography for code snippets and balances

rules.name: The Gradient Voice Rule
rules.body: Primary headlines and brand highlights use a 135deg gradient from Electric Violet (#6c63ff) to Sui Cyan-Blue (#3b82f6).

dos: Do use semantic CSS variables rather than hardcoded hex values
Do use JetBrains Mono for code snippets and balances
donts: Don't use solid white backgrounds for cards in dark mode
Don't use generic blue/red alert colors outside the defined palette
